verification.title: Credential Verification
verification.scanInstruction: Scan this QR code with your EUDI Wallet to verify your identity

qr.title: Credential Verification
qr.scanInstruction: Scan this QR code with your wallet
qr.footer: Scan the QR code with your wallet to verify your identity
qr.credentialLabel: YOU WILL BE ASKED TO PRESENT:
qr.step1Description: Align your camera with the code displayed on the left.
qr.step2Title: Select required credential on your digital Wallet
qr.step2Description: Choose the verified attributes requested by the system.

validation.title: Verification in Progress
validation.subtitle: SECURE AUTHENTICATION ACTIVE
validation.message: Waiting for credentials from your wallet...
validation.submessage: Please authorize the request on your device.

welcome.title: Verification Successful
welcome.subtitle: IDENTITY CONFIRMED
welcome.submessage: Access granted. You have been successfully verified.
welcome.footer: You may now proceed to access requested services.
